examples.review_snippet: Mr. Castillo is clearly a skilled attorney. Got a great result for our business dispute. Communication was excellent. Knocking off one star because the timeline ran about 2 months longer than estimate

Attorney Walsh is clearly a skilled attorney. Got a great result for our business dispute. Communication was excellent. Knocking off one star because the timeline ran about 2 months longer than estima
The good: Mr. Harris clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
Mixed experience with the practice. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.
Solid but not spectacular. Ms. Huang handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
Strong recommend for the practice with one caveat — the intake process was slow and confusing. Once the case got rolling, everything was excellent. End result exceeded my expectations.
Attorney Davis fought hard for me and delivered a strong result. I'd recommend them to friends. The one thing I'd change is more frequent proactive updates — I had to initiate most check-ins myself.
Really pleased with Ms. Goldstein's representation. Knowledgeable, honest, and genuinely cared about my situation. Billing was on the higher end of what I expected, hence 4 stars instead of 5.
Outstanding experience from start to finish with the practice. Clear communication, transparent billing, and a fantastic outcome. This is what great legal representation looks like.
Ms. Okonkwo handled my case with expertise and genuine care. Always available, always prepared, always honest. The result was outstanding. I've already referred two friends.
